                      +[  Service Layer  ]--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
                      |                                                         +[  Data Layer  ]-----------------------------+ |
                      |                                  +-----------------+    |                                             | |
                      |                          +------>|  Order Service  +----o-+                                           | o
+---------------+     |  +----------------+      |       +-----------------+    | |                                           | o+--------------------+
|  API Gateway  +-----o->|  User Service  +------+                              | |                           /------------\  o+o|  Response Builder  |
+---------------+     |  +----------------+      |                              | +-------------------------->|  Order DB  ++ |+o+--------------------+
                      |                          |                              |                             \------------/| |||
                      |                          |                              |                                           +-o+o
                      |                          |                              |  /-----------\                            | | |
                      |                          +------------------------------o->|  User DB  +----------------------------+ | |
                      |                                                         |  \-----------/                              | |
                      |                                                         |                                             | |
                      |                                                         |                                             | |
                      |                                                         |                                             | |
                      |                                                         +---------------------------------------------+ |
                      +---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
